title: ACDP Registry Capabilities (v0.0.1)
description: The capability declaration document served at /.well-known/acdp.json. Tells consumers what algorithms, embedding models, and limits the registry supports.

acdp_version.description: The ACDP specification version this registry implements.

registry_did.description: The registry's own DID, typically did:web:<hostname>.

supported_signature_algorithms.description: Signature algorithms accepted on publish. MUST contain 'ed25519' (RFC-ACDP-0001 §5.10).

supported_embedding_models.description: Embedding model identifiers indexed by this registry. Empty if registry does not index embeddings.

read_authentication_methods.description: Read-authentication methods supported by this registry. At least one MUST be declared if the registry serves any non-public contexts. See RFC-ACDP-0008 §6.2.

anonymous_public_reads.description: Whether anonymous (unauthenticated) reads are permitted for public contexts. See RFC-ACDP-0008 §6.3.

supported_did_methods.description: DID methods this registry can resolve. MUST contain 'did:web' (RFC-ACDP-0008 §4.7). Examples: 'did:web', 'did:key'.

supports_idempotency_key.description: Whether this registry honors the Idempotency-Key header on POST /contexts. See RFC-ACDP-0003 §6.

profiles.description: Profile(s) this implementation claims conformance to. MUST contain 'acdp-registry-core' for any registry. See RFC-ACDP-0001 §9.

max_payload_bytes.description: Maximum size of a publish request body in bytes.

max_embedded_bytes.description: Maximum decoded size of any embedded data reference. Fixed at 64 KB by the spec.

max_embedding_dimensions.description: Maximum embedding vector dimensionality accepted by this registry on similarity requests. See RFC-ACDP-0005 §3.5.

max_top_k.description: Maximum top_k accepted in similarity requests. See RFC-ACDP-0005 §3.5.

$comment: additionalProperties is true to support forward compatibility — future versions will add capability flags here.
